strong_claims_allowed: STWM / TUSB-v3.1 + trace_belief_assoc improves over calibration-only, cropenc, and legacysem under the official frozen checkpoint/readout setting.
Trace belief readout uses trace-conditioned semantic identity belief rather than pure external teacher retrieval.
Official belief readout supports future identity association on context-preserving matched evaluation.
moderate_claims_allowed: OOD robustness is positive in current materialized true-OOD splits but should not be phrased as universal OOD dominance.
Downstream utility supports representation usefulness, but not broad planning or full world-model capability.
Mechanism evidence is supportive but bounded; do not elevate it to a fully stable cross-seed mechanism theorem.

source_of_truth.claim_boundary: reports/stwm_belief_final_decision_20260424.json plus bounded conflict audit from earlier variants
